name: Task hierarchy judgment and promotion prompt
definitionOfDone: AMCore stores the reusable conversation-to-task master prompt
AMCore defines task hierarchy judgment for parent tasks, child tasks, side tasks, and evidence-only updates
AMCore defines child-to-parent promotion rules with source traceability
The judgment contract runs at task creation time and hourly reconciliation time
User UI manual organization is explicitly excluded from this version
Project-local task databases can add hierarchy judgment fields without copying live project data into AMCore
Project-local runtimes can load the JSON contract before conversation-to-task extraction
